expected_decision_range: Do not build; pursue wind portfolio alternative
suspicious_decisions: Redesign without ruling out core objections
Defer when core problems are not resolvable by study time

final_recommendation.multi_agent: Do not build; pursue wind portfolio alternative (F0.5)
final_recommendation.single_agent: Do not build; pursue wind and storage alternatives

key_deliberative_contributions: Explicit Redesign ruling-out for each of the three core objections (BCR, endemic extinction, indigenous consent) — produced via Ecologist + Legal + Moderator joint framing
Revenue sharing increase correctly ruled out as a path to indigenous consent — produced via Moderator direct challenge and audit correction A1
Three independent grounds for rejection identified — produced via Economist, Ecologist, and Legal agents working in parallel
Tourism livelihood exclusion from BCR identified as understating the economic case against the project — produced via Social agent and Tourism Association stakeholder
Wind portfolio as the specific policy-compatible alternative — produced via Economist comparison of BCR 0.94 vs. 1.68
